class.name: C3Http._Stub
class.brief_description: Canned-response builder returned by [method C3Http.Mock.stub]. Configure with [method ok], [method fail], or [method returns], then discard — the [C3Http.Mock] retains the stub internally.

method.name: ok
method.description: Configures a successful response. [param json] is JSON-encoded into [member C3Http.Response.body].

method.name: fail
method.description: Configures a failure response. Build [param error] with the [C3Http.RequestError] factory methods ([method C3Http.RequestError.transport], [method C3Http.RequestError.timed_out], etc.) or construct one manually.

method.name: returns
method.description: Sets a [C3Http.Response] directly, bypassing [method ok] and [method fail].
